title: The Magus of Messkirch: Martin Heidegger
original_title: Der Zauberer Von Messkirch: Martin Heidegger
overview: A documentary about the life and work of german philosopher Martin Heidegger, born and raised a Roman Catholic in Messkirch, Baden-Württemberg.
